'''dowadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinetted|cabinetted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinetted|cabinetted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dowadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowadithi|dowadithi]] || [[word:dowadiji|dowadiji]] || [[word:dowadishi|dowadishi]] || [[word:dowadiki|dowadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowaduthuthu|dowaduthuthu]] || [[word:dowadujuju|dowadujuju]] || [[word:dowadushushu|dowadushushu]] || [[word:dowadukuku|dowadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowaduthu|dowaduthu]] || [[word:dowaduju|dowaduju]] || [[word:dowadushu|dowadushu]] || [[word:dowaduku|dowaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowadufthuf|dowadufthuf]] || [[word:dowadufjuf|dowadufjuf]] || [[word:dowadufshuf|dowadufshuf]] || [[word:dowadufkuf|dowadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowadethe|dowadethe]] || [[word:dowadeje|dowadeje]] || [[word:dowadeshe|dowadeshe]] || [[word:dowadeke|dowadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowadothotho|dowadothotho]] || [[word:dowadojojo|dowadojojo]] || [[word:dowadoshosho|dowadoshosho]] || [[word:dowadokoko|dowadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowadotho|dowadotho]] || [[word:dowadojo|dowadojo]] || [[word:dowadosho|dowadosho]] || [[word:dowadoko|dowadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowadofthof|dowadofthof]] || [[word:dowadofjof|dowadofjof]] || [[word:dowadofshof|dowadofshof]] || [[word:dowadofkof|dowadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfthÃŸf|dowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfjÃŸf|dowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfshÃŸf|dowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfkÃŸf|dowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dowadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dowadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dowadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dowadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfthÃŸf|dowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfjÃŸf|dowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfshÃŸf|dowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfkÃŸf|dowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfthÃŸf|dowadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfjÃŸf|dowadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfshÃŸf|dowadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowadÃŸfkÃŸf|dowadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowadÃḊthÃḊ|dowadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dowadÃḊjÃḊ|dowadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dowadÃḊshÃḊ|dowadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dowadÃḊkÃḊ|dowadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowadathatha|dowadathatha]] || [[word:dowadajaja|dowadajaja]] || [[word:dowadashasha|dowadashasha]] || [[word:dowadakaka|dowadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowadatha|dowadatha]] || [[word:dowadaja|dowadaja]] || [[word:dowadasha|dowadasha]] || [[word:dowadaka|dowadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowadafthaf|dowadafthaf]] || [[word:dowadafjaf|dowadafjaf]] || [[word:dowadafshaf|dowadafshaf]] || [[word:dowadafkaf|dowadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dowadasha|dowadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowadshÃḋsha|dowadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowadrosha|dowadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowadmusha|dowadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowadyasha|dowadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowadnkshÃḋsha|godowadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowadnkrosha|godowadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowadnkmusha|godowadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowadnkyasha|godowadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dowawadasha|dowawadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowawadshÃḋsha|dowawadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowawadrosha|dowawadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowawadmusha|dowawadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowawadyasha|dowawadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowawadnkshÃḋsha|godowawadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowawadnkrosha|godowawadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowawadnkmusha|godowawadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowawadnkyasha|godowawadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dewÃḊdasha|dewÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dewÃḊdshÃḋsha|dewÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dewÃḊdrosha|dewÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dewÃḊdmusha|dewÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dewÃḊdyasha|dewÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|godewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godewÃḊdnkrosha|godewÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godewÃḊdnkmusha|godewÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godewÃḊdnkyasha|godewÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dowfadasha|dowfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowfadshÃḋsha|dowfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowfadrosha|dowfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowfadmusha|dowfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowfadyasha|dowfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowfadnkshÃḋsha|godowfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowfadnkrosha|godowfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowfadnkmusha|godowfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowfadnkyasha|godowfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
